title: Hybrid Energy Storage System
description: Intelligent power splitting between battery and supercapacitor for EV efficiency.

narrative.challenge: Handling high-frequency power peaks during EV acceleration that degrade battery life.
narrative.solution: Developed a real-time EMS using a Rule-Based logic to shunt peak currents to a supercapacitor bank.
narrative.impact: Theoretical battery lifecycle extension of 15% and improved regenerative braking efficiency.

title: Regenerative Suspension System
description: Electromagnetic energy harvesting from road vibrations.

narrative.challenge: Lost kinetic energy in standard suspension dampers during rough road travel.
narrative.solution: Designed a linear electromagnetic generator (EMG) integrated into the strut assembly.
narrative.impact: Harvested up to 200W of ancillary power, directly recharging the low-voltage onboard systems.

title: Altitude Hold Control System
description: High-precision PID control for quadrotor UAV stability.

narrative.challenge: Maintaining millimeter-level hover accuracy in turbulent outdoor environments.
narrative.solution: Implemented a cascaded PID loop with complementary filter sensor fusion for IMU data.
narrative.impact: Stable hover within ±5cm error margin during 15km/h wind gusts.
